title: Why Has ChargePoint Holdings (CHPT) Underperformed the Broader Market
text: ChargePoint Holdings has significantly underperformed the broader market due to several factors including profitability concerns, high cash burn historically, stock dilution from capital raises, execution challenges in product launches and partnerships, and competitive pressures from larger players like Tesla. The stock peaked in 2020 and has fallen 95% from those highs. Recent operational improvements including margin expansion and cash burn reduction have provided some support but are insufficient to reverse the longer-term underperformance. Investors continue to question whether the company can execute its path to profitability before cash runs out or further dilution occurs.
